context: PR #313 (feat: local filesystem repo references) merged into main. Several context/ entries are stale: two completed plans need archiving, one task-stash points at an already-complete plan, and current-task.json still carries the Phase 3 metadata. This plan executes the CLAUDE.md archive + stash-pop protocols so the next session starts from a clean slate.
session_startup: Run git status to verify working tree state
Run git branch --show-current — expect either feat/local-fs-repos-20260414-2235 (before task sync-main-branch runs) or main (after)
Read this file to find current task
Find first task where status=pending and blocked_by=null

tasks.name: Sync local main and delete merged feature branch
steps: Run git status — confirm working tree is on feat/local-fs-repos-20260414-2235 with only context/current-task.json modified (leave alone) and librust_out.rlib untracked (handled in remove-stray-artifacts)
Run git checkout main
Run git pull — pull the merged PR #313
Run git log --oneline -3 — confirm the merge commit (or squashed commit) for local-fs-repos is at HEAD
Run git branch -d feat/local-fs-repos-20260414-2235 — succeeds because the branch is merged. If it reports 'not fully merged', investigate before using -D
acceptance_criteria: main HEAD contains the local-fs-repos changes (e.g. docs/src/local-paths.md exists in the checkout)
feat/local-fs-repos-20260414-2235 no longer appears in git branch --list

tasks.name: Delete untracked librust_out.rlib debris
steps: Run git status to confirm librust_out.rlib is still present and untracked
Delete librust_out.rlib at repo root
Verify git status no longer lists it
acceptance_criteria: librust_out.rlib no longer exists at the repo root
git status output no longer mentions it

tasks.name: Archive the completed ls-exclude-bug plan
steps: Run grep '"status"' context/ls-exclude-bug.json — expect 5/5 complete (already verified in 2026-04-15 cleanup planning session)
Run git mv context/ls-exclude-bug.json context/completed/
Stage the move and commit with message: 'chore(context): archive completed ls-exclude-bug plan'
acceptance_criteria: context/completed/ls-exclude-bug.json exists and contains the original plan content
The move shows as a rename in git log

tasks.name: Archive the completed github-action-impl-plan
steps: Run grep '"status"' context/github-action-impl-plan.json — expect 7/7 complete (already verified)
Run git mv context/github-action-impl-plan.json context/completed/
Stage the move and commit with message: 'chore(context): archive completed github-action-impl-plan'
acceptance_criteria: context/completed/github-action-impl-plan.json exists and contains the original plan content

tasks.name: Delete current-task-stash1.json since its target is already archived
steps: Verify current-task-stash1.json still points at ls-exclude-bug (it does as of 2026-04-15)
Verify ls-exclude-bug was moved to context/completed/ by the archive-ls-exclude-bug task

Delete context/current-task-stash1.json — the pop protocol says rename the stash back to current-task.json, but that only applies when the stash holds in-progress work. Since the target plan is complete, discarding the stash is the correct action
Stage the deletion (git rm context/current-task-stash1.json) as part of the next commit

tasks.name: Update current-task.json to reflect completion of local-fs-repos
steps: Discard the uncommitted diff on context/current-task.json that was carrying Phase 3 session metadata — the feature shipped via PR #313; the metadata is no longer load-bearing. Run git checkout -- context/current-task.json to revert to the committed Phase 2 snapshot, OR overwrite it directly in the next step
Decide the next active plan: init-apply-bug-plan (5 pending tasks) or performance-review (3 pending tasks) or null. Confirm with the user before writing

Write the new current-task.json with 'task', 'plan', 'last_updated', 'description', and a session_startup array. If no next plan is chosen, use { "task": null, "plan": null, "last_updated": "2026-04-15", "description": "No active plan. Pick up init-apply-bug-plan or performance-review next session." }

Commit with message: 'chore(context): clear stale stash and reset current-task after local-fs-repos ship'. Include the stash deletion from the previous task in this commit (they are one logical cleanup unit)
Run git status — expect clean working tree
acceptance_criteria: context/current-task.json points at the chosen next plan (or has null task/plan fields)
Working tree is clean per git status
Commit history contains the archive + reset commits, each in conventional-commit format

tasks.name: Verify main is still healthy after the cleanup commits
steps: Run ./script/ci — should pass (these are context-only changes, no code impact)
Optional: run cargo nextest run if paranoid; context changes do not affect tests
acceptance_criteria: No stray artefacts or uncommitted files remain

notes: Tasks with blocked_by=null can run in parallel (sync-main-branch and remove-stray-artifacts).
Two of the context/ entries that are NOT touched here — init-apply-bug-plan.json (5 pending) and performance-review.json (3 pending) — remain available for future sessions to pick up.

The archive commits are separate per plan per the CLAUDE.md convention ('chore(context): archive completed <plan-name>'). Stash-pop + current-task reset happen in one combined commit because they are logically inseparable (the stash-pop is the trigger for deciding what the new current-task points at).
